turns.speaker: Patient
turns.text: The pain never stops. Some days I can't work, and honestly I'm losing hope it'll ever get better.

turns.speaker: Doctor
turns.text: Living with constant pain is exhausting in every sense. Let's talk about what support you have.

turns.speaker: Patient
turns.text: I feel like a burden to my family, and the hopelessness is almost worse than the pain itself.
